questions.prompt: If a domain is on a Filtering Policy's Allow list, a Block list entry on the same policy can still override it.
questions.explanation: Allow lists always win, both per-policy Allow and Universal Allow entries override block lists, threat feeds, and category blocks for the queries those policies apply to.

questions.prompt: A query log row says the domain was blocked under category Phishing. The user insists they need to access it. What do you do?
choices: Add a per-policy Allow entry with a note
Add a Universal Allow so it's resolved everywhere
Don't allowlist, escalate, the verdict was Phishing
Recategorise the domain via the Domain Report Tool
questions.explanation: Frontline techs never allowlist threat-category blocks. Phishing, Malware, Botnet, Cryptomining stay blocked regardless of the user's request, escalate so the right person investigates.
